title: Fake Job Offer Scam
description: Fraudsters offer fake high-paying jobs in MNCs and demand registration fees, training charges or laptop deposits.
example: Congratulations! You are selected for Amazon WFH job. Pay ₹2,500 registration fee on this UPI to confirm.

title: OTP Sharing Scam
description: Scammers impersonate bank or delivery agents and ask victims to share OTP to 'verify' or 'cancel' a transaction.
example: Sir, your SBI account will be blocked in 1 hour. Please share the OTP you just received to keep it active.

title: UPI Collect Request Fraud
description: Scammer sends a UPI collect/payment request disguised as money being sent to you. Approving debits your account.
example: I am sending you ₹5,000 for the OLX item. Please enter UPI PIN to receive the payment.

title: KYC Update Scam
description: Fake SMS or call claiming your KYC is expired and account will be frozen unless you click a link or share details.
example: Dear Customer, Your PAN is not updated in HDFC. Update now: bit.ly/kyc-update or account will be blocked.

title: Courier / FedEx Scam
description: Caller claims a parcel in your name contains drugs and threatens arrest unless you transfer 'verification' funds.
example: This is FedEx. A parcel with MDMA was found in your name. Cyber Cell will arrest you. Transfer ₹50,000 for verification.

title: Instant Loan App Scam
description: Chinese loan apps offer quick loans then harass, blackmail and morph photos of borrowers to extort money.
example: Get ₹50,000 in 5 minutes — no documents! Just install RupeeFast app and grant all permissions.

title: Stock Tip / Investment Scam
description: WhatsApp/Telegram groups guarantee multibagger stock picks then trap victims in pump-and-dump or fake trading apps.
example: Join our VIP group! 200% return in 7 days. Limited seats — pay ₹999 membership to lock-in profits.

title: Lottery / KBC Lucky Draw
description: Caller claims you won a KBC or BMW lottery and asks for tax/processing fees to release the prize.
example: You won ₹25 lakh in KBC lottery! Pay ₹8,500 GST on this UPI to claim your prize money.

title: WhatsApp Impersonation Scam
description: Scammer copies your contact's profile photo and messages family asking for urgent money transfer.
example: Beta, this is uncle. I lost my phone. Send ₹10,000 to this UPI urgently, will return tomorrow.

title: Banking SMS Phishing
description: Fake SMS pretending to be from your bank with a link asking to update password or net-banking details.
example: ICICI: Your debit card is blocked. Reactivate: http://icici-secure.link/login

title: Malicious QR Code Scam
description: Seller insists you scan a QR code to 'receive' payment. Scanning and entering PIN actually debits your account.
example: Scan this QR to get your refund. Just enter your UPI PIN — money will be credited instantly.

title: Fake Customer Care Scam
description: Victims search bank/Paytm customer care on Google and call fake numbers run by fraudsters who take remote control.
redFlags: Number from Google not official site
example: I am Paytm support. Install AnyDesk so I can refund your stuck payment of ₹3,000.

title: Digital Arrest / Fake Police
description: Scammers in police/CBI uniform video call victims claiming a case is registered and place them under 'digital arrest'.
example: This is CBI. Your Aadhaar is linked to a money laundering case. Don't disconnect the call, transfer ₹2 lakh for verification.

title: Matrimonial / Romance Scam
description: Fake profiles on matrimonial or dating apps build trust over weeks then ask for money for medical/visa emergencies.
example: Darling, I sent you gold and iPhone from London. Customs needs ₹75,000 to release the parcel.

title: Online Shopping / Fake Website
description: Heavy-discount fake e-commerce websites take payment and never deliver, or deliver counterfeit products.
example: iPhone 15 at ₹15,999! Limited stock. Order now on shopindia-deals.in — only prepaid via UPI.
